query:
SELECT c.code as countryCode, c.name as countryName, COUNT(r.id) as regionCount
FROM countries c
LEFT JOIN regions r ON r.countryId = c.id AND r.isActive = 1
WHERE c.code IN ('FR', 'DE', 'ES', 'NL')
GROUP BY c.code, c.name
ORDER BY c.name;
